name: alienvault-search-alarms

outputs.description: Date Time the alarm occurred. AlienVault.Alarm.ReceivedTime
outputs.name: AlienVault.Alarm.OccurredTime

outputs.description: Time the alarm was received. AlienVault.Alarm.Source Alarm source object.
outputs.name: Date

outputs.description: Alarm Source IP Address. AlienVault.Alarm.Source.Organization Source organization.
outputs.name: AlienVault.Alarm.Source.IPAddress

outputs.description: Source country. AlienVault.Alarm.Destination Alarm destination object.
outputs.name: AlienVault.Alarm.Source.Country

outputs.description: Alarm destination IP Address. AlienVault.Alarm.RuleAttackID Rule attack ID.
outputs.name: AlienVault.Alarm.Destination.IPAddress

outputs.description: Rule method. AlienVault.Alarm.RuleAttackTactic Rule attack tactic.
outputs.name: AlienVault.Alarm.RuleMethod
